Oracc: CAMS/GKAB — CAMS Geography of Knowledge Corpus

CTN 4, 048 [Šumma Alu 001][via cams/gkab]

flake
(start of surface missing)
flake 1'flake 1'

[...] ina IRI ⸢IGI*⸣ [...]

[...] is seen in a city [...].

flake 2'2'

[...] ina IRI IGI IRI* BI* [...]

[...] is seen in a city: that city [...].

flake 3'3'

[*] ⸢u₂*⸣KI.KAL ina IRI IGI IRI BI [...]

(If) grass is seen in a city: that city [...].

flake 4'4'

* u₂KI.KAL BABBAR ina IRI IGI IRI BI [...]

(If) white grass is seen in a city: that city [...].

flake 5'5'

* mim-ma* U₂ EDIN ina IRI IGI IRI BI [...]

(If) any plant of the open country is seen in a city: that city [...].

flake 6'6'

[*] [mim]-ma* U₂* KUR.RA ina IRI IGI IRI BI [...]

(If) any mountain plant is seen in a city: that city [...].

flake 7'7'

[...] IRI-ia UR.GI₇ ⸢is-si⸣ [...]

[...] (in) my city, a dog cries out [...].

flake 8'8'

[...] ⸢ANŠE⸣ MIN<(is-si)> [...]

[...] a donkey ditto (cries out) [...].

flake 9'9'

[...] ⸢UR⸣.BAR.RA MIN<(is-si)> [...]

[...] a wolf ditto (cries out) [...].

flake 10'10'

[...] x A [...]

[...] ... [...].

(end surface missing)
